text.content:
Welcome to Starforged Custom Compendiums!

Please enjoy using all of the resources provided by authors in the Ironsworn: Starforged community.

Links to all of the resources can be found in the Journal Entries compendium. The links are grouped by the authors.

There are several documents that provide links to resources sorted by type, genre and utility.

@UUID[Compendium.starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustomjournalentries.JournalEntry.PkBRJG7GU5tu6fll]{Adventures and Fiction}

@UUID[Compendium.starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustomjournalentries.JournalEntry.I0Ffj42tIsZu4iW5]{Gameplay Aids}

@UUID[Compendium.starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustomjournalentries.JournalEntry.8r9vT5ILE25Ky32W]{Genres and Themes}

@UUID[Compendium.starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustomjournalentries.JournalEntry.kL3bHDfwk7z4Mhf0]{Ship Types, Classes and Details}

@UUID[Compendium.starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustomjournalentries.JournalEntry.npNQEZqufpY3KMuL]{System Conversions}

@UUID[Compendium.starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustomjournalentries.JournalEntry.pvevOz6ATYyC7Nhb]{Truths}

Enjoy!

jendave

Changelog

Starforged Custom Compendiums

3.0.4 (2025-11-14)

  • Fix bug with marker placement.
  • Update minimum FoundryVTT version to v12.

3.0.3 (2025-11-14)

  • Added a macro to build the starting sector. For full functionality, include the following modules:

    • Token Attacher - for attaching planets to settlements.
    • JB2A - Jules&Ben's Animated Assets - for creating passages between settlements.
    • Sequencer - for creating passages between settlements.
  • Added sample macro to create passages between settlements from the fantasycomputer.works tutorial

3.0.2 (2025-10-19)

  • Added Legacy Iron (Starforged Asset Pack) by Ludic Pen.

3.0.1 (2025-10-11)

  • Fixed links to Ironsworn 1.5-ish E.
  • Update Intro documention.

3.0.0 (2025-10-11)

  • Added documentation to the journal compendium so that finding resources is now much easier.

    • Journal entries are organized by utility, genre and author.
  • Added Ironsworn 1.5-ish E by Iceyman.
  • Added icons from Game-icons.net to assets by nqjasmine, lemunde and Iceyman.
  • Added Moments Forged - Starforged Adventure Starters by Margot Hutton
  • Updated the filename of the Macro compendium. This may require a re-install of the module since the old compendium may leave an artifact.
  • Reorganized and added some missing Oracles, Macros and Assets.

2.0.14 (2025-08-29)

  • Added Voidforged by Kerys.
  • Created a new compendium to hold Journal Entries. This will be useful for holding custom Truths and for documentation of the resources.

2.0.13 (2025-08-12)

  • Added Spacefaring Interludes by Shawn Tomkin.

2.0.12 (2025-05-07)

  • Minor fixes.

2.0.11 (2025-05-07)

  • Added Moves from Learning From Your Failures in Starforged by Shawn Tomkin.

2.0.10 (2025-04-30)

  • Added Spacefaring Waypoints by yourGMJack.

2.0.9 (2025-03-23)

  • The Oracles/Rolltables are now system-agnostic.

2.0.8 (2025-02-25)

  • Verified for Foundry v13.

2.0.7 (2025-01-18)

  • Added Sundered Isles Underwater Oracles oracles by mjatthijs.

2.0.6 (2024-12-11)

  • Updated I Owe My Soul to the Company Planet oracles.

2.0.5 (2024-12-10)

  • Fixed Research oracle array from the The City on the Breeze oracles.

2.0.4 (2024-11-10)

  • Added helper macros for Ask the Oracle by benstraub.

2.0.3 (2024-10-09)

  • Fixed macros that use Creature Rank Generator.

2.0.2 (2024-10-09)

  • Updated Critical Success oracles by jendave.

2.0.1 (2024-10-02)

  • Added the following resources by nqjasmine.

    • Ironforged V1
    • Crimes Oracle
  • Created new Starforged Custom Moves compendium.

2.0.0 (2024-09-29)

  • Renamed and moved Gitlab project to a new URL. Starforged Custom Compendiums.
  • May require uninstalling/reinstalling the module.

  • Reorganized the compendium folder structure.

    • New worlds will create the correct folder structure.
    • Current worlds might not.

1.0.18 (2024-07-19)

  • Macros now use the current Roll Mode instead of always being Public Rolls.

1.0.17 (2024-06-01)

  • Verified for FoundryVTT v12.

1.0.16 (2024-04-27)

  • Added Creature Rank Generator oracle by jendave.
  • Added macros to generate creatures and NPCs.

1.0.15 (2024-04-21)

  • Added Time Traveller by lemunde.

1.0.14 (2024-03-15)

  • Added Ship Classes in Starforged by Shawn Tomkin.

1.0.13 (2024-02-12)

  • Added Star Wars Oracles by cdoghusk.
  • Added The City on the Breeze oracle arrays by jendave.
  • Updated Critical Success oracles by jendave.
  • Added recommended modules for installation.

1.0.12 (2024-01-04)

  • Added I'll Be Home for Life Day! oracle by jendave.

1.0.11 (2023-12-29)

  • Added Exotic Planets oracles by mjatthijs.

  • Added Exploration Oracle Arrays by Castelviator.

    • The oracle arrays depend on the oracles in the following FoundryVTT modules in addition to the Starforged Oracles.

      • Ironsworn and Ironsworn: Delve
      • Ironsmith Expanded Oracles for Ironsworn
      • Starsmith Expanded Oracles for Ironsworn: Starforged

    • The oracle arrays depend on the following oracles in the Starforged Custom Oracles module.

      • Better + Moons by Ellie_Valkyrie
      • Exotic Planet Oracles by Mjatthijs
      • Settlement Detailing for Starforged by Alan Wilson.

1.0.10 (2023-12-06)

  • Added I Owe My Soul to the Corporate Planet oracles by jendave. Submission to the Coalitions of Ironsworn and Starforged Jam

1.0.9 (2023-11-24)

  • Added Creature Tags Hot Sauce and Sojourn Hot Sauce oracles by lm77.

1.0.8 (2023-11-21)

  • Added MegaCorp Hot Sauce oracles by lm77.
  • Added Critical Success oracles by jendave.

1.0.7 (2023-11-06)

  • Added The Starforged Sojourner oracle from rossum.

1.0.6 (2023-11-05)

  • Fixed bug in Sworn Quest Mad-lib oracle

1.0.5 (2023-11-01)

  • Added Iron City oracles by vishae.
  • Cleaned up macro output.
  • Cleaned up Oracle descriptions.

1.0.4 (2023-10-30)

  • Added Settlement Weather oracles and macros from wilsonam.

1.0.3 (2023-10-27)

  • Added Forging Festivities oracle from Julius Hennig.
  • Added Better + Moons oracles and macro from ellie-valkyrie.

1.0.2 (2023-10-17)

  • Added She Cannae Take It! and Settlement Detailing oracles and macros from wilsonam.
  • Added "Sworn Quest" Oracle mad-lib from Starforged rulebook p.386.
  • Added Positive Plot Twists Oracle by dukethesquirrelking.
  • Added Gender Expression Oracles by kindfulkirby.
  • Added Starforged Gear Oracles by illinalta.

1.0.1 (2023-10-04)

  • Added macros for NPC and Plot oracles by wilsonam.

1.0.0 (2023-10-01)

  • Initial release.

Ironsworn: Starforged Custom Compendiums

About

A FoundryVTT compendium of homebrew resources for the Ironsworn: Starforged system.

Contact

  • Ironsworn/Starforged Discord Server - FoundryVTT Channel (jendave)
  • FoundryVTT Discord Server - Module Discussion Channel (jendave)
  • VOID Affiliate Network Discord Server - Game Hacks Channel (jendave)
  • GitHub Repository
  • Itch.io

Features and Notes

  • Oracle tables contributed by fans are included in the compendium.
  • Read the documentation in the journal compendium to locate resources by author, utility type, genre and theme.
  • Want your Oracle included? Contact us on the Ironsworn/Starforged Discord Server!
  • The Oracle/Rolltable compendiums are system-agnostic. The other compendiums are only available for the Ironsworn & Starforged.

Module Installation

To install the module, search for Starforged in the Add-On Modules tab of of the Foundry VTT game setup screen. Then click on Install.

Or use this URL and click on Install:

https://github.com/jendave/starforged-custom-compendiums/releases/latest/download/module.json

Use Custom Folders to add Oracles, Assets and Moves to the Character Sheet

  • Use the following method to integrate the Starforged Custom Oracles into the character sheet.

    • If it does not already exist, create a Custom Oracles folder in Rollable Tables tab called:

      • Custom Oracles - EN
      • Oráculos personalizados - ES
      • Oracles personnalisés - FR
      • Własne Wyrocznie - PL
      • Свои оракулы - RU

    • Open the Starforged Custom Oracles compendium and copy the folders into the Rollable Tables Custom Oracles folder.

    • The Oracles will be available in the Character sheet under Custom Oracles.

  • Use the following method to integrate the Starforged Custom Assets into the character sheet.

    • Create a Custom Assets folder in the Items tab called:

      • Custom Assets - EN
      • Recursos Personalizados - ES
      • Ressources personnalisées - FR
      • Własne Aspekty - PL

    • Open the Starforged Custom Assets compendium and copy the Items into the Items Custom Assets folder.

    • The Assets will be available in the Character sheet under Custom Assets.

  • Use the following method to integrate the Starforged Custom Moves into the character sheet.

    • Create a Custom Moves folder in the Items tab called:

      • Custom Moves - EN
      • Movimientos personalizados - ES
      • Actions personnalisées - FR
      • Własne Ruchy - PL

    • Open the Starforged Custom Moves compendium and copy the Items into the Items Custom Moves folder.

    • The Moves will be available in the Character sheet under Custom Moves.

  • Reload the current FoundryVTT session by pressing CTRL-R (Windows/Linux) or CMD-R (Mac).
  • Note that when using Custom Resources that refer to other Custom Resources, the character sheet may not scroll to other custom resources like it does with system resources.

Macros

  • Drag and drop macros from the Starforged Custom Macros compendium to the macro bar. Macros use the current Roll Mode when executed.

Build Starting Sector Macro

  • Try out the starting sector generation macro to generate an entire starting sector with settlements, planets, stars, passages and a connection.

  • For full functionality, include the following modules:

    • Token Attacher - for attaching planets to settlements.
    • JB2A - Jules&Ben's Animated Assets - for creating passages between settlements.
    • Sequencer - for creating passages between settlements.

Dependencies

  • The oracle arrays depend on the oracles in the following FoundryVTT modules in addition to the Starforged Oracles.

    • Ironsworn and Ironsworn: Delve
    • Ironsmith Expanded Oracles for Ironsworn
    • Starsmith Expanded Oracles for Ironsworn: Starforged
    • Augmented Reality Cyberpunk City Kit

Credits

  • The Starforged Sojourner oracle by rossum is used with permission granted to copy for personal use only.
  • Exploration Oracle Arrays by Castelviator used with permission from the author.
  • Star Wars Oracles by cdoghusk used with permission from the author. You can buy his books from Amazon.

  • Spacefaring Waypoints by yourGMJack used with permission from the author.
  • Ask the Oracle macros were contributed by Ben Straub.
  • Voidforged by Kerys is licensed for use under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY).
  • Ironsworn 1.5-ish E by Iceyman is used with permission from the author.
  • Moments Forged - Starforged Adventure Starters by Margot Hutton is licensed for use under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY).
  • Legacy Iron (Starforged Asset Pack) by Ludic Pen used with permission from the author.
  • Linked Effect Between Tokens tutorial script from Sequencer Documentation licensed under the MIT license.

The following resources by mjatthijs are used with permission from the author.

Module by David Hudson and licensed for use under the MIT license.

All resources have been converted from their original format into a format comaptible with FoundryVTT.

Licenses and permissions for the macros are listed in the source code.

Resources

Many great Ironsworn and Starforged Resources can be found at the links below.

  • Awesome Ironsworn
  • Starforged 2022 Jam
  • Starforged 2023 Jam
  • Starforged: Ancient Connections Jam
  • Ironsworn Jam 1

Acknowledgements

Created for the incredible Ironsworn and Ironsworn: Starforged family of games.

Many thanks to Ben Straub for his fantastic Ironsworn & Starforged Game System.

Many thanks to graygeist (Discord) for help with finding Oracles to add and getting permission from the authors.

Modules

The following modules were used in the development process

  • Foundry VTT Content Parser
  • DF Manual Rolls
  • Game-icons.net
